title: I built an open-source stock price alert app with Telegram pings and AI review via MCP
author: Substantial-Seat-800
selftext:
Hey everyone 👋

I built a small open-source stock price monitoring dashboard.

You can add your favorite tickers, create smart price alert rules, and get Telegram notifications when an alert fires. It also includes an MCP server, so you can connect your AI agent and let it review prices, alerts, and market context.

It uses free Yahoo Finance data and streams live updates into a dashboard.

Mostly built for my own investing workflow, but I thought it might be useful for others too.

Would love to hear feedback or ideas from people who track stocks actively.

GitHub: [https://github.com/yuriymarad/price-ping](https://github.com/yuriymarad/price-ping)
